Book a bay on your phone, unlock the door with your phone, and start the ball machine when you're ready. Tennis or pickleball — 30 seconds from phone to first serve.

We'll text you the second the bays open. No spam, promise.

By entering your number and joining, you agree to receive marketing and account texts from Tennis Terminal at the number provided, including messages sent by autodialer. Consent isn't a condition of any purchase. Message frequency varies; message & data rates may apply. Reply STOP to cancel or HELP for help. See our Privacy Policy & Terms.

Tennis & pickleball
How it works

Three taps and you're playing

No front desk. No sign-in sheet. No waiting on a coach. Just you and the court, whenever it works for you.

01

Book a bay

Pick your sport, pick a time. Reserve in about 30 seconds — no account setup, no membership.

02

Unlock the door

We text you a code. Tap to unlock your bay when you arrive — the lights are already on.

03

Play

Start the ball machine when you're ready. Dial in speed and spin from your phone, and get to work.

Pricing

Pay for the time you play

Prices depend on your sport — tennis is a solo ball-machine session, pickleball splits one bay up to four. No membership, ever.

Tennis Solo practice
Off-peak
$32/hr
Peak
$50/hr
✓Ball machine included — it's never an upsell
Pickleball Up to 4 players
Off-peak
$24/hr
Peak
$38/hr
+Ball machine optional — +$8/hr for solo drilling

Racquets and balls on-site if you need them — no charge. See the FAQ. Full pricing →

The space

Four bays on the Brooklyn waterfront

A bright, warm room right on the water — big windows, real cushioned court surface, and enough net height to actually swing. Each bay is yours alone for your booked hour. No sharing, no shuffling on and off.

Private bays
Just your group, every time
Gear on hand
Loaner racquets & balls
Ferry & bike close
Steps from the waterfront
Open late
7am to 11pm, daily
Events & parties

Book the whole place out

Birthdays, team offsites, league nights, kid's parties — take over the bays for a couple hours. We'll set up the machines, you bring the crew. Beginners more than welcome.

Birthday bash

Two bays, two hours, all the balls you can hit. Great for kids and grown-ups alike.

From $180

Team offsite

Whole-venue buyout for up to 16. A round-robin, a little coaching, zero pressure.

From $360

League night

Standing weekly slot for your crew. Same bay, same time, locked in for the season.

Ask us
Plan an event →
Our story

The anti-country-club

We got tired of courts you had to join a club to touch, coaches you had to book weeks out, and prices that treated a casual hit like a luxury. So we built the opposite.

Tennis Terminal is a self-serve practice room where anyone — beginners, families, rusty former players — can walk in, grab a bay, and just play. No membership to belong to. No one watching. Your court, your schedule.

Welcoming Tech-forward Affordable
FAQ

Good questions

Do I need a membership?+

Nope. Never. You pay for the bay by the hour, and that's the whole deal. Book once or book every day — up to you.

I've never played. Is this for me?+

Perfect. The ball machine is the friendliest way to start — set it slow, hit a hundred balls, no one watching. Beginners are exactly who we built this for.

What do I need to bring?+

Just yourself and sneakers with a clean sole. We keep loaner racquets and balls on-site at no charge, so you can show up empty-handed and still play.

How does the door unlock?+

When you book, we text you a code and a tap-to-unlock link that goes live at your start time. Walk up, tap, and you're in — the lights and your bay are already set.

Can I bring friends or my kids?+

Absolutely. A bay fits up to four, and the price is the same whether it's just you or a full group. Family sessions are some of our favorites.

What if I need to cancel?+

Life happens. Cancel up to 12 hours before your slot for a full refund, right from the same link we texted you.

Be first through the door

We're opening on the Brooklyn waterfront soon. Join the waitlist and we'll text you the moment the bays go live — plus a free first hour on us.

You're on the list. See you on court.
